ChatSession.title: ChatSession
ChatSession.description: Represents an individual chat conversation session with metadata.

id.description: Unique session ID containing alphanumeric characters

title.description: The computed or user-specified title of the chat thread

updatedAt.description: Epoch timestamp representing last updated date

activeModel.description: The active AI model used in the session

Message.title: Message
Message.description: Holds the individual dialog turns (User and AI) inside a session.

id.description: Unique message ID containing alphanumeric characters

sessionId.description: The ID of the session this message belongs to

content.description: The markdown or text payload of the message

attachments.description: List of rich media attachment records associated with this prompt

/sessions/{sessionId}/messages/{messageI.description: Nested subcollection holding all messages for a specific session.
